# Avoimempi Eduskunta — Client Package

> React 19 SPA frontend for the Finnish Parliament data platform. Uses Material-UI (MUI) 7 with Emotion styling, i18next for Finnish/Swedish translations, and Recharts for data visualization.

## Entry Points

- `root.tsx` — Creates React DOM root, wraps `App` with `ThemeProvider` and `HallituskausiProvider`, initializes i18n
- `app.tsx` — Main app component: fetches `/api/db-info`, `/api/version`, `/api/changes-report`; sets up providers (`TraceProvider`, `OverlayDrawerProvider`); manages SPA routing via `popstate`; renders active page inside Suspense

## Pages

Defined in `pages/index.ts` as a route map. Each page is lazy-loaded.

| Route key    | URL path       | Title (FI)     | Component file                        |
|--------------|----------------|----------------|---------------------------------------|
| (empty)      | `/`            | Etusivu        | `pages/Home/index.tsx`                |
| edustajat    | `/edustajat`   | Edustajat      | `pages/Composition/index.tsx`         |
| puolueet     | `/puolueet`    | Puolueet       | `pages/Parties/index.tsx`             |
| istunnot     | `/istunnot`    | Istunnot       | `pages/Sessions/index.tsx`            |
| aanestykset  | `/aanestykset` | Äänestykset    | `pages/Votings/index.tsx`             |
| asiakirjat   | `/asiakirjat`  | Asiakirjat     | `pages/Documents/index.tsx`           |
| hallitukset  | `/hallitukset` | Hallitukset    | `pages/Hallitukset/index.tsx`         |
| muutokset    | `/muutokset`   | Muutokset      | `pages/Changes/index.tsx`             |
| laadunvalvonta | `/laadunvalvonta` | Laadunvalvonta | `pages/Laadunvalvonta/index.tsx`   |

### Page Subdirectories

- `pages/Home/` — Dashboard with recent sessions, votings, party composition, and analytics signals
- `pages/Composition/` — Parliament member list with `Details.tsx` for representative detail view
- `pages/Parties/` — Party list; `PartyDetail.tsx` for party-level analytics
- `pages/Sessions/` — Calendar and session browser; components in `pages/Sessions/components/`
- `pages/Votings/` — Voting browser with filters; `VoteResults.tsx` for vote breakdown
- `pages/Documents/` — Legislative document browser by type; `cards/` and `components/` subdirectories
- `pages/Insights/` — Advanced analytics: attendance, party discipline, close votes, coalition/opposition, speech activity, time-series stats, voting activity
- `pages/Hallitukset/` — Government period browser with minister lists
- `pages/Changes/` — Data change log
- `pages/Laadunvalvonta/` — Data quality dashboard

## Key Components (`components/`)

- **`VotingCard.tsx`** — Voting result card with collapse/expand and OverlayDrawer support. Accepts `onOpenDetails?: () => void`; when provided, uses drawer instead of inline collapse. Contains `VotingDrawerContent` for drawer use.
- **`DocumentCards.tsx`** — Document card rendering for all legislative document types.
- **`PageDataSourcesDrawer.tsx`** — Data provenance overlay. Shows row-level import trace and per-table summaries. Reads `traceItem` from `TraceContext`.
- **`ItemTraceIcon.tsx`** — Hover-visible icon that opens the data trace drawer. Parent element needs `className="trace-hover-parent"` for hover CSS.
- **`VotingResultsTable.tsx`** — Party and member voting breakdown table.
- **`RichTextRenderer.tsx`** — Renders `RichTextDocument` (parliament minutes rich text).
- **`MinutesContentBlock.tsx`** — Session minutes content blocks.
- **`DocumentLifecycle.tsx`** — Legislative document lifecycle/stage display.
- **`EduskuntaSourceLink.tsx`** — External link to eduskunta.fi for a document.

## Context Providers (`context/`)

### `OverlayDrawerContext.tsx`
Standard pattern for all detail views. Provides a slide-in side drawer with navigation stack.

```typescript
const { openRootDrawer, openDrawer, replaceDrawer, closeDrawer } = useOverlayDrawer();

openRootDrawer({
  title: "Title",
  subtitle: "Optional subtitle",
  meta: "Optional meta info",
  actions: [<Button />],
  content: <MyDetailComponent />,
  onClose: () => {},
});
// openDrawer pushes onto stack (shows back button)
// replaceDrawer updates top of stack
// openRootDrawer resets stack
```

Already wired into: Votings, Documents, Home, Sessions, Parties, Composition, Insights.

### `TraceContext.tsx`
Holds `traceItem | null` and `setTraceItem`. Used by `ItemTraceIcon` to set the item being traced, and by `PageDataSourcesDrawer` to display the trace. The drawer registers its open callback via `registerOpenDrawer`.

### `HallituskausiProvider` (`filters/HallituskausiContext.tsx`)
Government period filter context — wraps the app and lets pages filter data by government period.

### `ThemeContext` (`theme/ThemeContext.tsx`)
Light/dark mode theme provider for MUI.

## Navigation Pattern

```typescript
// Navigate to a page
window.history.pushState({}, "", "/aanestykset?q=talousarvio");
window.dispatchEvent(new PopStateEvent("popstate"));
```

The app listens to `popstate` and re-renders the active page. URL params are read on mount and on `popstate` to support deep-linking and intra-page navigation.

## Document Type Navigation

```typescript
import { inferDocumentType } from "pages/Documents";

// Maps identifier prefixes to document page types
inferDocumentType("HE 1/2024")   // → "hallituksen_esitys"
inferDocumentType("KK 1/2024")   // → "kirjallinen_kysymys"

// Build navigation URL
refs.documents(type, q)  // → "/asiakirjat?type=...&q=..."
```

## i18n

Uses i18next with Finnish as the primary language. Translation keys are Finnish-language strings. Translations are initialized in `root.tsx`.

## EDK Document PDF URL Pattern

```
https://www.eduskunta.fi/FI/vaski/JulkaisuMetatieto/Documents/{edk_identifier}.pdf
```

## Styling

- MUI 7 components with Emotion (`@emotion/react`, `@emotion/styled`)
- Global font: Zilla Slab (loaded from `/fonts/Zilla_Slab/`)
- Dark gradient background on the app shell
- Mobile-first responsive layouts
